name: Together - NZ
description:
Media Agency of the Year, IAB NZ Awards 2025.
Media Agency of the Year, Campaign Asia 2024.
Deloitte Fast50 Company, 2023.
Digital Agency of the Year, IAB NZ Awards 2023.
Digital Agency of the Year, IAB NZ Awards 2022.
Media Agency of the Year, Beacon Awards 2022.
Media Agency of the Year, Campaign Asia 2022.

Together is one of New Zealand’s fastest growing and most highly awarded independent media agency / consultancy hybrids. 

We were established by industry leaders to challenge the traditional media, digital and performance agency model. We focus on bringing together the thinking, technology and data required to put the right message, in front of the right person, at the right moment. To do this our team combines award-winning strategic and digital thinking with leading edge technology, data and analytics.
